endpoints.name: Global - DEA Background Check
endpoints.description: Comprehensive background check service using DEA (Drug Enforcement Administration) databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against international drug enforcement records.

fullName.description: Full name for search (alternative to document search)

documentType.description: Document type (required if not using fullName)

documentNumber.description: Document number (required if not using fullName)

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth (required for certain document types: CCPA, CI, CPF, DUI, CCUY)

expirationDate.description: Document expiration date (required for document types CE, PPT, and PEP; dd/mm/yyyy)

endpoints.name: USA - Vehicle Verification
endpoints.description: Retrieve U.S. vehicle details by license plate and state (NHTSA-backed decode). Use plate and state as query parameters.

endpoints.name: Colombia - SIMIT Payment Agreements
endpoints.description: Verify active payment agreements for transit fines registered in SIMIT.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Driver License Verification (RUNT)
endpoints.description: Verify Colombian driver license status and validity through the RUNT system.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Electoral Records Verification
endpoints.description: Electoral records verification service for Colombia citizens. Provides voting status and electoral information.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Basic Vehicle Information
endpoints.description: Retrieve general registration data and basic characteristics of a Colombian vehicle by its license plate.

endpoints.name: Colombia - SIMIT License Suspensions
endpoints.description: Check for driver license suspensions or cancellations in the SIMIT system.

endpoints.name: Chile - Vehicle Verification
endpoints.description: Query by license plate (plate, no spaces or dots). Typical fields include make, model, year, VIN/chassis, engine, color, vehicle type, fines summary, and owner RUT when the registry exposes them—use for fleet onboarding, collateral checks, and claims workflows.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Complete Vehicle Report (By VIN)
endpoints.description: Get an exhaustive history and technical report of a vehicle in Colombia using its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN).

endpoints.name: Brazil - National ID Verification
endpoints.description: Confirms a Brazilian natural person’s CPF against official sources. Provide CPF, date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY, and the document number with or without separators; when the data matches, the response returns normalized name parts and identifiers. Built for KYC, fraud prevention, and regulated onboarding.

endpoints.name: Email OTP
endpoints.description: Send a one-time passcode by email for user verification flows. Provide the recipient address and message parameters; the API delivers the OTP and returns send/delivery metadata for KYC and login confirmation.

endpoints.name: Colombia - National ID Verification
endpoints.description: Verify Colombian national ID (cédula) information. Get full name, document status, and basic citizen verification data.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Health Records Verification
endpoints.description: Access Colombian health records through Rethus system. Verify medical history, health status, and healthcare provider information. Requires document type (CC, CE, PPT) and document number.

endpoints.name: Colombia - Certificate of Fiscal Responsibility (Contraloría)
endpoints.description: Certificate of fiscal responsibility from the Contraloría General de la República.

endpoints.name: Venezuela - National ID Verification
endpoints.description: This route returns identity data for Venezuelan nationals using the CCVE (Cédula de Identidad) document class. Send the cédula number as documentNumber; the API resolves the record and returns structured name fields for KYC, onboarding, and fraud checks. For foreign residents, use GET /v2/ve/foreigner-id (CEVE) instead.

endpoints.name: Mexico - Vehicle Verification
endpoints.description: The Vehicle Information service provides detailed information about a vehicle in Mexico based on its license plate number. This service specifically returns information about a vehicle's make, model, year, VIN, and other related details. Pass the plate in the plate query parameter on a GET request; responses include registration-oriented fields when a match is found.

endpoints.name: Global - Interpol Background Check
endpoints.description: International background check using Interpol databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against international criminal records and wanted lists.

endpoints.description: The Peruvian Vehicle Information service provides detailed data about registered vehicles in Peru based on their license plate number. The response includes key details such as the vehicle's make, model, year, engine and chassis serial numbers, seating capacity, and usage type.

endpoints.name: Peru - Vehicle Verification
endpoints.description: This service provides information on the insurance status of a vehicle in Peru. It returns details including the insurance company name, policy start and end dates, vehicle plate number, policy number, usage type, vehicle class, and policy status.

endpoints.name: Costa Rica - National ID Verification

endpoints.name: Chile - Public Transport Vehicle

The service response will contain the name of the company, its business category, subcategory, and activity. Additionally, this service will provide you with a list of services for which the company is authorized to work.

To use this service, simply provide the document image in Base64-encoded format or a URL where the image is hosted, and let our system handle the rest.

endpoints.name: Canada - Company Lookup
endpoints.description: Look up a Canadian legal entity in provincial business registries using business (company name) and province (two-letter code). Typical fields include business number, status, registry identifiers, and address. Use for KYB, vendor due diligence, and compliance.

endpoints.name: Face Comparison
endpoints.description: Compares a probe image against one or more gallery images and returns a similarity score. Use search_mode to balance speed and accuracy.

endpoints.name: Live Face Comparison
endpoints.description: Compares a live probe image against a gallery and performs liveness validation on the probe. Both comparison and liveness thresholds are configurable.

endpoints.name: Face Liveness Detection
endpoints.description: Detects whether a submitted face image comes from a live person or a spoof (photo, screen replay, printed copy). Returns a liveness score and a pass/fail outcome based on a minimum score threshold.

endpoints.name: Face Detection
endpoints.description: Detect human faces in an image. Returns bounding boxes and quality signals; commonly used as a pre-step before liveness or face-compare flows.

endpoints.name: Face Search
endpoints.description: Searches one or more images against a face collection and returns potential matches ranked by similarity.

endpoints.name: Mexico - Company Lookup
endpoints.description: This endpoint looks up a Mexican legal entity by its FME (Folio Mercantil Electrónico) identifier. Use GET with documentType=FME and documentNumber to retrieve official registration details such as legal business name and city from government commercial registry sources.
